title.en: Chromatic Splendor: The Art of Refraction

description.ko: 단일한 백색광이 유리 프리즘을 통해 다채로운 무지개 빛깔로 분산되는 물리적 현상을 시각화하여, 명확함과 변화의 상징을 아름답게 표현했습니다.
description.en: A stunning visualization of light physics where a single white beam transforms into a spectrum of colors through a glass prism, symbolizing clarity and transformation.

prompt: A cinematic close-up of a high-clarity triangular glass prism resting on a dark reflective surface. A singular beam of brilliant white light enters the prism and exits as a vibrant, perfectly defined spectrum of rainbow colors. Ray tracing, volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, sharp focus on the internal light path, ethereal atmosphere.
